basics.name: Sean Dundon
basics.label: Technical Product Leader
basics.summary: Experienced leader in product management with a strong background in software development, Linux administration, and product strategy. Proven track record of driving revenue growth, optimizing user experiences, and leading cross-functional teams in the web hosting industry.

work.name: Newfold Digital
work.summary: Led the product management function for web hosting products at the world's second largest web hosting provider.
highlights: Managed the product roadmap and growth strategy for the largest hosting products.
Managed a team of product managers supporting 15 software teams and 2 systems teams.
Led the design, development, and release of a Scalable Shared hosting product, generating $2mm incremental revenue in the first year.
Developed a new revenue stream by differentiating hosting products.
Oversaw the user experience design for all complex product integrations and setup flows.

work.name: Newfold Digital
work.summary: Managed the roadmap and strategy for hosting products and infrastructure serving strategic brands.
highlights: Led a major overhaul of hosting performance, resulting in recognition as a top-tier hosting provider.
Sponsored the creation of an internal orchestration solution, resulting in significant savings.
Oversaw technical and user experience design for various hosting products after the merger between Endurance International and Web.com.

work.name: Endurance International Group
work.summary: Managed the product function for HostGator.com, serving approximately 800,000 customers and generating $170 million in annual revenue.
highlights: Delivered a 5pp increase in first-time monthly renewal rates, worth approximately $1mm in first-year revenue.
Built a predictable and transparent SDLC in partnership with Engineering leadership.
Turned around annual growth rate of virtualized hosting solutions from -5% to +5% YoY.

work.name: Endurance International Group
work.summary: Managed day-to-day business operations for all Texas-based hosting brands.
highlights: Developed a cross-training program, increasing customer satisfaction by 10pp and reducing support costs by 15%.
Successfully consolidated two additional hosting brands onto the HostGator platform.

work.name: Endurance International Group
work.summary: Managed Linux and Windows systems administration as well as the Billing and Fraud prevention teams.
highlights: Received the Endurance CEO award for significant impact on HostGator Linux department improvements.
Implemented workforce management practices for ticket-based support.

work.name: Endurance International Group
work.summary: Led the HostGator front-line support team in Austin, achieving a 30% productivity increase and a 10-point NPS improvement.
highlights: Implemented a new system for call center performance tracking.
Achieved a 40% reduction in frontline support costs while improving morale.

work.name: HostGator.com
work.summary: Supported a team of Linux administrators in abuse, compliance, migrations, and support departments.
highlights: Named Linux Admin of the Month, December 2011.

work.name: HostGator.com
work.summary: Provided escalated support for customers and resolved over 12,000 support tickets.
highlights: Named Employee of the Month, December 2011.

work.name: ASportsD
work.summary: Cofounded a software startup providing a platform for amateur athletes to attract recruiters.
highlights: Conducted market research to identify TAM, SAM, and SOM.
Managed a team of two software development interns.

work.name: Secure Data Software
work.summary: Developed custom LOB software solutions for small and medium businesses.
highlights: Designed database schemas and conducted business analysis.
Developed ETL processes and user interfaces.
